creator: ecrist@claimlynx.com
text:
After an upgrade from FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE, group membership contained in LDAP with nss_ldap was not registered or read.  The cause was narrowed
        down to the patch made to net/nss_ldap/files/bsdnss.c (1.4 to 1.5).  Reversing this patch allowed nss_ldap to register proper group membership.

Fix: 

Reverse the patch comitted with ports/152982
How-To-Repeat:         Configure LDAP and FreeBSD authentication following the instructions located here:
        * http://www.secure-computing.net/wiki/index.php/OpenLDAP
        * http://www.secure-computing.net/wiki/index.php/OpenLDAP/Authentication

        This configuration works fine on FreeBSD < 9.0 with the net/nss_ldap port prior to this patch.
